visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt sits at a desk with blinds behind him, holding a phone to his ear while speaking. The scene cuts to an older man with gray hair in a black shirt, also on a phone, seated in a dimly lit room with a chandelier and golden statue. The view returns to the first man, now shown in profile, looking down while listening on the phone.
audio_description: A male voice speaks into a phone, followed by a reply from another male voice, with clear, conversational tone.
